title: Nothing Happened
situation: After the battle with Gecko Moria, Zoro takes all of Luffy's accumulated pain from Bartholomew Kuma to protect his captain and crew, enduring near-fatal agony in silence.
knows: Luffy must survive to pursue his dream
His own life is expendable if it secures the crew's future
Sanji was willing to make the same sacrifice
does_not_know: Whether his body will survive the full pain transfer
Kuma's deeper motives and affiliations at that time
How this moment will shape crew dynamics later
